name: Floor-to-Ceiling Adjustable Wood Cat Tower (95"-108")
features: Height Adjustable: Fits ceilings from 95 to 108 inches
Material: Premium solid wood & natural sisal

reviews.comment: Perfect for my high-energy Bengal! Very stable.
The wood finish matches my living room furniture perfectly.

name: Sisal Wood Climbing Tower - Adjustable Floor-to-Ceiling Pole
features: Natural Wood Color: Blends into modern home aesthetics
Eco-friendly sisal wrapped posts for endless scratching
Slim footprint: Ideal for apartments and small spaces

reviews.comment: Simple to install and my cat was on it within minutes!

name: 72.8" Wooden Luxury Tower with Triple Spaceships
features: Triple Transparent Spaceships: See your cat's paws from below
Elegant Slim Design: Sophisticated wood & white finish
Includes plush hammock for cozy afternoon naps

reviews.comment: The spaceship capsules are hilarious and cute. Great quality.
